2145280.name: Rikua
2145280.description:
Step into Rikua, a cyberpunk roguelite adventure where rogue AIs threaten the balance of power. As a new recruit for a government agency - called A.M.S.U. - you’ll hunt them down across different environments using a unique blend of side-scrolling agility, precision third-person shooting, and agressive isometric combat.

IN SEARCH OF THE TRUTH

Play as Rikua, a young recruit who joins the Anti-Mechanical Special Unit (A.M.S.U.) in pursuit of answers from her past. Each mission pits you against rogue insurgents, while sponsors support your cause offering powerful enhancements to aid in your success. Choose wisely between weapons and upgrades during every run - your decisions will shape your survival, earn your victories, and ultimately, find out whether you’re truly fighting for the right side of the war.

SHAPE YOUR DESTINY

As missions grow more dangerous, Rikua earns credits to unlock new weapons and upgrades. With each run, she becomes stronger, faster, and deadlier against the insurgency. Sponsors may grant powerful boons that unlock new abilities, but it’s up to you to choose the right mix of weapons, upgrades, and enhancements to complete each mission and carve your own path towards your destiny.

STRONGER WITH EVERY FALL

Every run brings unique enemies and challenges. Environments shift between missions, and bosses demand different strategies. Sometimes you’ll reach the end—but sometimes you won’t. Each death sends Rikua back to the hub, her home base, where she can regroup, train, and take on new challenges set by friendly Digital Pantones. From here, you’ll unlock new items, uncover hidden information, earn medals, and reveal secrets that elevate your rank and push the storyline forward—bringing you closer to what lies behind the famous Mechanical War.

THE FEATURES OF THE GAME:

  • Triple-perspective gameplay: Switch seamlessly between side-scrolling agility, precision third-person shooting, and tactical isometric combat.

  • Roguelite progression: Earn credits, unlock weapons, and select enhancements that make each run stronger, faster, and deadlier.

  • Dynamic environments: Conquer shifting missions across diverse arenas of steel and soil, facing bosses that demand unique combat strategies.

  • Narrative-driven journey: Uncover Rikua’s past, rise through the ranks of A.M.S.U., and question where your true allegiance lies.

  • Hub-based growth: Regroup after each fall, train with new weapons, unlock decorations, earn medals, and take on challenges from Digital Pantones. Discover secrets that advance your rank and push the story forward.

  • Cyberpunk atmosphere: Immerse yourself in a neon-soaked world of endless possibility—a reimagining of design, rebellion, and power.
2145280.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
